message:
test(core): add conformance oracle tests for BETWEEN, IN, CASE, subqueries, and string functions

Add 322 lines of new oracle-comparison tests against rusqlite covering:

- BETWEEN with integers, reals, NOT BETWEEN, and NULL val handling
- IN with mixed types, NOT IN, IN with NULL elements
- CASE with NULL, CASE with no ELSE, nested CASE
- Type coercion (text vs integer comparisons, CAST in WHERE)
- Arithmetic with NULL, COALESCE chains, IIF
- Complex subquery patterns: correlated EXISTS, scalar subquery in SELECT,
  ANY/ALL patterns
- String functions conformance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
